name: structure-me-site
description: Static site for Structure Me — Insights content sourced from Sanity at build time.

scripts.build: npm run build:insights && npm run build:homepage && npm run build:about && npm run build:services && npm run build:studio
scripts.build:studio: cd studio && npm ci --no-audit --no-fund && npx sanity build ../studio-app --yes && node ../scripts/patch-studio-paths.mjs
